title: Accessible Dropdown Menu

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Dropdown Menu

Build a dropdown combobox supporting keyboard arrow key controls.

### Requirements:
1. **Aria Attributes**: Set wrapper to display correct roles like `aria-expanded` and role state tags.
2. **Arrow Key Navigation**: While open, `ArrowDown` and `ArrowUp` keys navigate active list items highlight indexes. Pressing `Enter` selects active highlight option.
3. **Escape to close**: Pressing `Escape` key closes active dropdown panel, keeping focus on trigger button.

constraints: Must support complete keyboard scrolling behaviors through focus indices
Active selection element must gain visual focused state indicators

starterCode.html:
• Option A
  • Option B
  • Option C

gradingCriteria.description: Verify ArrowUp and ArrowDown navigate menu items, and Enter selects highlighted items.
Verify aria-expanded updates dynamically to true/false states.
